CurrentUser.description: Self-DTO for `/auth/me` and the response of auth mutations.
CurrentUser.title: CurrentUser

MemberDTO.description:
Flat shape per screen inventory §3.9 — `id`, `display_name`, `email`,
`initials`, `avatar_color`, `role`. Deleted users are filtered out by the
list endpoint (anonymization removes the email anyway, so they'd render
blank). `joined_at` is included for the row's secondary metadata.
MemberDTO.title: MemberDTO

UserSummary.description: Lightweight user reference used in listings, mentions, assignments.
UserSummary.title: UserSummary

get.description: Return 200 if Postgres is reachable, otherwise 503 (TDD §13.4).
